items: Jac Caglianone homered 2 times, driving in 3 as Kansas City beat Texas, 5-3.
Dillon Dingler homered 2 times, driving in 4 as Detroit beat Minnesota, 10-4.
Matt Olson homered 2 times, driving in 3 in Chicago White Sox's 6-5 win over Atlanta.
St. Louis pitching combined to shut out The Mets, 7-0.
Cincinnati edged San Diego, 5-3, in 11 innings.
Toronto walked off Philadelphia, 3-2 — one of 3 one-run finishes across the league.
